name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥 New Puzzle Hobo is a soft and refined short Nappa leather shoulder bag 👜 Inspired by the Puzzle bag's rectangular shape and unique geometric lines, it starts with looks and stays true to the leather, especially the softness of the puzzle hobo which is stunning 🎀 The colors are super nice, stylish and versatile, cool yet sweet, really amazing, I love it 😻 Classic Nappa leather, soft and delicate to the touch~ The geometric design is really durable and can be carried for a long time 💚 Short shoulder strap, one external zip pocket and one interior pocket ✨ Leather zip pull, D-ring to connect personalized charms 🔗 Chevron cotton canvas with Anagram embossing 🛍️
Dimensions: 28CM~10CM~5.5CM
Style No.: 8018
Color: Green
